reviews.review_description:
UPDATE:
They've done it! After 5 years its finally stereoscopic 3D 360, with a simple and intuitive interface. Good thing I still have my Gear VR. Requires a subscription though, and it's kind of pricey because aimed at professional users. I wish they come up with a "leisure" version.

ORIGINAL:
Interface is not intuitive. Image is not 3D.
Hi developer, please check the overall interface style for the app "theViewer" and the map interface of the app "Viso Places". And please try to add 3D 360 content. Those are my suggestions.
Or maybe it does but it wants your own files. I dont know, just some purple stuff.
I just CAN'T uninstall this sh**t!!!!!!
